= No Helper/Complete Independence (Timely, Safely)
145 _39PG SCL_INTRCTN_GOAL_CD (39Pg) Social Cognition - Social Interaction: Goal CHAR 2 A score indicating the desired goal for the patient to achieve for social interaction at discharge. Social interaction includes skills related to getting along and participating with others in therapeutic and social situations. It represents how one deals with one's own needs together with the needs of others. 01 = Helper - Complete Dependence/Total
